title: agentic worker verdict
description: The one JSON result a worker run writes to the compose-named verdict file. `agentic verdict` validates it against this schema before updating the tracker.

status.description: Terminal disposition of the task attempt.

summary.description: One-paragraph plain-language summary of what happened.

commits.description: Commit subjects this attempt produced, if any.

unblock.description: The typed action needed to unblock the task. Required when status is BLOCKED. Types mirror the human-blocker vocabulary.

deferred_questions.description: Open questions surfaced instead of guessing. Required (non-empty) when status is DEFERRED.

discovered.description: Work discovered during the attempt; filed as new issues linked discovered-from the origin task.
